examples: Enjoy the lollypop and we will be home in 40 minutes!
The lollypop is not only a pretty gift, but also the courage and confidence to make me live longer!
He loved children. He always favored me with a piece of caramel, mint, or lollypop when I came to his store.
Images are fed into a lollypop-like device that Craig holds in his mouth, this transforms the pictures into electrical impulses that he can feel on his tongue.
